sections.research_overview:
## 2. 研究概述



### 2.1 研究主題

> A survey on Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving, contrasting traditional Vision-Action with emerging VLA frameworks, categorized into End-to-End VLA and Dual-System VLA paradigms.

### 2.2 研究領域分類

- [ ] World Model (世界模型)
- [ ] Video Generation (影片生成)
- [ ] 3D Scene Understanding (3D場景理解)
- [ ] Motion Planning (運動規劃)
- [x] End-to-End Driving (端到端駕駛)
- [ ] Simulation (模擬器)
- [ ] Occupancy Prediction (佔用預測)
- [ ] Neural Rendering (神經渲染)

### 2.3 所使用的自動駕駛架構

- [ ] **Modular Pipeline** (模組化管線)
- [ ] **End-to-End** (端到端)
- [x] **World Model + Planner** (世界模型 + 規劃器)
- [ ] **Foundation Model** (基石模型)

---
